submitPayload.prompt: Create a polished anime-style chibi OGP card for a shareable X post. Character identity: 安楽椅子探偵 (ORLP). This must be the exact same character as the reference chibi, not a redesign. Preserve the same face, hairstyle, outfit, props, and core color palette as the reference chibi. Keep the result cute and chibi-proportioned, but not static, idle, or sticker-like. The generated image itself must include the title typography as part of the final design. Render the exact Japanese title text "安楽椅子探偵". Render the exact type code text "ORLP". Keep the spelling, casing, and character order exact. Do not translate, paraphrase, or replace the requested text. Do not translate the Japanese title into English or any other language. The only Latin letters allowed in the image are the exact type code characters. Place the title and type code as integrated editorial typography on the right side of the composition. The typography should feel designed into the image, not pasted on afterward. Gender presentation: male. Age impression: 30代前半. Archetype: 椅子に座して全体を読む推理家. Character notes: 一歩引いた位置から盤面全体を俯瞰し、見えない構造を見抜く落ち着いた男性。. Outfit and props: ダークネイビーのカーディガン、ベスト、白シャツ、丸眼鏡、膝に置いた本。書斎に似合う知的で柔らかな装い。. Core palette: dark navy, brown, ivory. Expression: 深く思考に沈んだ落ち着いた顔. Base pose cue from the type data: 片手で顎に触れながら静かに考え込む. Supporting visual hints: Character illustration for a murder mystery personality result card. One Japanese male character in his early 30s, armchair detective archetype reading the whole board, intelligent and calm, dark brown hair with a hint of silver gray beginning at the temples, neat side part, round glasses. Dark navy cardigan, vest, white shirt, book in hand. Waist-up composition, warm study-like indoor lighting, navy and brown themed background, cinematic, highly detailed, no logo マーダーミステリー診断の結果カード用イラスト。日本人男性キャラクター1人, 30代前半, 書斎で全体を読む安楽椅子探偵タイプ, 知的で落ち着いた雰囲気, 白髪が混じり始めたダークブラウンの7:3分けの髪, 丸眼鏡。ダークネイビーのカーディガン, ベスト, 白シャツ, 本を添えた装い。上半身構図, 書斎のような暖かな室内光, ネイビーとブラウンを基調にした背景, シネマティック, 精密描写, ロゴなし. Pose direction (reaction-side): Create a fast sideways reaction with weight shift, asymmetrical shoulders, and a sharp side gaze or hand movement. Favor a side-heavy composition with visible directional flow. Compose exactly one character, large in frame, with a strong diagonal silhouette. Make the pose extremely bold, asymmetrical, and mid-action. Ensure either the torso twist, limb action, or gaze direction clearly suggests motion. Prefer a composition that feels surprising and physically dynamic rather than neat or centered. An unusual camera angle is welcome if readability stays strong. Use a restrained atmospheric background with minimal clutter and clean value separation. Keep the integrated title and type code highly readable at social-card size. Keep the bottom-right corner visually simple and blank. Do not place any text there. Do not add any text other than the exact requested title and type code. Do not add logo, watermark, extra characters, or a plain upright pose. Avoid: multiple characters, childish proportions, overly comedic expression, excessive skin exposure, overly casual modern outfit, low resolution, blurry, logo, watermark, extra props, deformed hands, 複数人, 子供っぽい体型, コミカルすぎる表情, 過度な露出, 現代カジュアルすぎる服装, 低解像度, ぼやけ, ロゴ, 透かし, 余計な小物, 手の崩れ, static standing pose, symmetrical pose, tiny character, unreadable silhouette, redesigned outfit, missing props, cluttered background, extra text beyond the exact requested title and type code, translated title, english headline, subtitle, brand label, caption, wrong spelling in the requested title or type code.
